title: Marine Drafter
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Our client is a leading Singapore based Marine Engineering & manufacturing company with a strong international footprint, an organization known for their technical expertise, and long standing global partnerships.

Role Summary:

The Marine Drafter is responsible for preparing and delivering accurate production and construction drawings to support vessel design and project schedules. This includes providing design expertise for engineering systems, structural components, piping, and ship outfitting. The position works closely with project engineers and PICs to produce construction, and as-built drawings, ensuring compliance with regulations and timely updates for priority deliverables.

Key Responsibilities :

  • Prepare production drawings and deliverables to support project
  • Provide design expertise for engineering systems, outfitting and structural design.
  • Produce detailed schematic drawings and outfitting construction drawings for the vessel.
  • Provide as-built drawings for vessel deliveries.
  • Work closely with design project PIC’s on urgent /priority drawings to update

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Naval Architecture/Mechanical Engineering or equivalent
  • Minimum of 2 years of experience
  • Prior experience in ship's piping systems and design of mechanical components will be preferred

If you are interested in this role, you may also send your CV with your expected salary to christiantan@techgrid.co

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted, thank you.

Tech Grid Asia Pte. Ltd

EA Licence Number: 24C2582

Personnel Registration Number: R25157686

Christian Tan

postedCompany.description:
Tech Grid Asia is your trusted career partner in the ASEAN region, with roots in Singapore and a growing presence in Thailand and Indonesia. We specialize in helping jobseekers like you find meaningful roles with leading employers across industries.

Whether you're looking for opportunities in tech or non-tech roles, permanent positions or contract work, we’re here to support you every step of the way. Our experienced recruiters work closely with top companies to match the right talent with the right opportunities—and that could be you.

At Tech Grid Asia, we believe that a job should be more than just work. That’s why we take the time to understand your skills, aspirations, and what truly matters to you. Our goal is to connect you with roles where you can grow, thrive, and build a fulfilling career.

Let us help you take the next step. Explore new possibilities with Tech Grid Asia—your future starts here.
